title: lippia ligustrina
intro: Lippia ligustrina, also known as Brazilian lavender, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family, native to South America. The medicinal properties of Lippia ligustrina include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Lippia ligustrina include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Lippia ligustrina can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
